title: hedyotis tomentosa
intro: Hedyotis tomentosa, also known as Chinese ehrhartia or Chinese weasel mint, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedyotis tomentosa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and improving digestion. Hedyotis tomentosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
